title: Amidst waving of party flags, an offbeat representation of the Flag above all flags
content: Against the backdrop of intense poll activity, a 400-metre stretch of an arterial road in the outskirts of Chennai (technically in Madurapakkam panchayat under Tambaram assembly constituency) presents a salute to the idea of res publica, which underpins India’s system of governance, where citizens have a say, at least before a government is securely ensconced in the seat of power.  A Republic Day initiative shines bright every night

title: Transnational terror case: J&K Police's Counter Intelligence Wing carries out raids in three districts
content: Raids by Counter Intelligence Wing of Jammu and Kashmir Police target key locations linked to a terror network orchestrated by Lashkar-e-Taiba operatives

title: Markapuram bus fire: Telangana sets up control rooms as victims traced to families in Andhra
content: The incident was reported on March 26 in Markapuram district, when a lorry rammed into a private passenger bus, triggering a massive blaze that rapidly engulfed both vehicles

title: Assembly Elections LIVE updates: BJP fields R.G. Kar victim’s mother from Panihati
content: AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K. Palaniswami (EPS) yesterday released the list of constituencies allotted to the constituents of the AIADMK-led National Democratic Alliance (NDA) in Tamil Nadu

title: Bus-truck collision in Markapuram LIVE: 13 killed, 25 injured; Chandrababu Naidu expresses shock
content: Chief Minister Nara Chandrababu Naidu expressed shock and deep sorrow over the burning of several passengers in the bus accident

title: LPG crisis: Cooking gas crunch revives firewood economy in rural and semi-urban Karnataka
content: The surge in demand, triggered by supply constraints linked to the ongoing West Asia crisis, has given rise to a parallel, largely informal firewood market in many districts

title: India among five nations granted passage through Strait of Hormuz by Tehran
content: Global oil and gas prices have surged after Iran virtually blocked the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow shipping lane between the Persian Gulf and the Gulf of Oman, that handles roughly 20% of global oil and LNG

title: Fuel outlets in Hyderabad packed on third consecutive day, no relief for LPG auto drivers on March 26 too
content: Telangana Civil Supplies Minister N. Uttam Kumar Reddy’s assurance that petroleum products are more than adequate for the next three months seems not to have convinced people

title: Sonia Gandhi responding well to treatment, remains under observation: Delhi hospital
content: Sonia Gandhi is likely to remain under observation at the hospital for a couple more days as a precautionary measure

title: Fuel crisis LIVE: LPG supply to be cut off if households refuse PNG switch where available, says Centre
content: Central Consumer Protection Authority directed hotels and restaurants not to levy additional charges, such as 'LPG charges' and 'fuel cost recovery', on consumers

title: When drinking water became a revolution | Mahad Satyagraha
content:
A century ago, Ambedkar led a protest in Mahad that turned the right to water into a fight for dignity and equality.
When drinking water became an act of resistance, this is the story of the Mahad Satyagraha. 100 years after Mahad, Ambedkar’s fight for equality still resonates across India.

title: Misinformation wave deepens anxiety in Hyderabad, triggers panic buying and citywide disruption
content: In the past few days, rumours of an impending “lockdown” have spread swiftly across social media platforms, prompting residents to rush to grocery stores and fuel stations in a bid to stock up on essentials

title: Jaishankar in France for G7 meet; West Asia crisis tops agenda
content: The Foreign Ministers will deliberate on exploring different negotiation channels that could lead to de-escalation in the West Asia and reopen maritime routes, the official said

title: West Bengal Assembly polls: Abhishek Banerjee takes fight to Suvendu’s backyard in Nandigram
content: The Trinamool Congress General Secretary held a workers’ meet in Nandigram and said that the flagship Sebaashray camp will be organised in the constituency if the party wins from the seat

title: Maharashtra Congress president demands NCP Minister resignation over a controversial video
content: Harshavardhan Sapkal said that it is shocking to see such unethical behaviour of a public representative in whom people have invested their faith and money

title: Seven Indian fishermen from Rameswaram arrested by Sri Lankan Navy
content: The Sri Lankan Navy personnel detained two boats, in which, seven fishermen were engaged in fishing, near Neduntheevu islet

title: India raises clean-energy ambition with 60% non-fossil fuel power goal by 2035
content: It also aims to reduce by 47% the intensity of emissions per unit of GDP and to increase its carbon sink to 3.5 billion tonnes-4 billion tonnes.

title: Four queer voices explain the impact of the Trans Amendment Bill 2026
content: The Transgender Amendment Bill which was passed in Lok Sabha on March 24 impacts a trans person’s ability to access better education, health care, and the right to self-determination, say gender-diverse members who took part in a nation-wide protest in Chennai on March 23. They strongly call for repealing the amendment

title: LPG fuel crisis: How to complain if a restaurant levies a fuel surcharge?
content: In an official advisory, the CCPA has listed steps to take if you are charged additional fuel-related costs like gas surcharge, fuel cost recovery charge, etc.

title: In Bengaluru, some people forced to pay bribe in instalments, alleges R. Ashok
content: Officials of city corporations running a ‘mafia’ to extract bribes for issuing e-Khatas in Bengaluru: R. Ashok (Session story, can go in city, depending on space) All major infrastructure projects in the city come to a grinding halt owing to a shortage of funds: BJP

title: 13 killed, 25 injured in bus-truck collision in Markapuram
content: Chief Minister Nara Chandrababu Naidu expressed shock and deep sorrow over the burning of several passengers in the bus accident

title: Malayalam actor-director E.A. Rajendran dies at 71
content: Rajendran was the brother-in-law of actor-MLA Mukesh. He was known for his versatile performances in Malayalam cinema and television

title: Facing evictions, Gulmarg hoteliers withdraw petitions ‘to settle issue with J&K Govt.’
content: Official sources said the J&K government, unlike the Lieutenant Governor administration, intended to form a committee to look into the lease issues and auctions

title: Autorickshaw knocks down woman, driver arrested for dumping body behind bus stop in west Bengaluru
content: The auto driver had taken the injured woman to a nearby hospital, but was advised by doctors to shift her to a speciality hospital for treatment

title: Andhra Pradesh reported 8,200 fatal and 10,600 non-fatal accidents in 2025
content: Andhra Pradesh registered 17,039 deaths in 2023 due to road accidents when compared to 16,693 deaths in 2022, suggest NCRB data

title: Game of throne: surfeit of faces for CM’s post in Congress in Kerala
content: P.J. Kurien endorses Chennithala, but leader downplays it, says final decision rests with high command; K.C. Joseph warns against potential divisiveness; Congress has ‘a galaxy of leaders’ capable of executing any political task, says Satheesan

title: Man found carrying ₹6 lakh to Vidhana Soudha, questioned by Bengaluru police
content: He told police that his relative was unwell and admitted to a hospital, and that he had brought the cash for medical expenses, and wanted to meet an MLA to get a recommendation letter to reduce the bill amount

title: Missing 84-year-old man traced by Bengaluru police after 25-day search
content: The police said the missing man, described as wheatish in complexion and of medium build, was suffering from a mental health condition

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Repeat contest in Kothamangalam as Antony takes on Shibu again
content: Even as human-wildlife conflict and farmers’ issues dominate the constituency, the position of Church groups, particularly the Jacobite Syrian Christian denomination, could be a decisive factor

title: Bengaluru metro to extend services till 2 a.m. for IPL match on March 28
content: To facilitate seamless travel, BMRCL said that IPL match tickets will include a QR code enabling two-way metro travel

title: IIM-K breaks into global top 100 in QS rankings
content: The institute has been ranked 78th worldwide in the narrow subject category of Business and Management Studies, marking a rise from 141st position last year

title: Fatal bus accident in Markapuram District sparks Statewide shock
content: According to the officials, the bus, belonging to Harikrishna Travels, was en route from Nirmal in Telangana to Nellore when the accident occurred

title: Bengaluru corporations plan night patrols, fix accountability to curb illegal banners
content: Among the major reasons behind the banner issue in the city are poor ground-level enforcement, lack of coordination, and the timing of banner installations

title: Private member bill seeks to establish central optical devices quality control and vision care regulation
content: The proposed bill seeks to offer remedy to the alleged vulnerability of consumers who according to the bill are in a “no-man’s land” between the manufacture of a lens and its delivery

title: LPG supply to be cut off if households refuse PNG switch where available: Government order
content: As India grapples with an LPG shortage due to the war in West Asia disrupting supplies from key sources, the government is pushing households and commercial users to switch to Piped Natural Gas (PNG)

title: Madras HC dismisses S.P. Velumani’s petition against I-T assessment order on 2016 Assembly poll expenses
content: Justice C. Saravanan rejects the 2023 writ petition filed against an assessment order passed in 2022 by treating the ₹7 crore as unexplained expenditure

title: BJP fields R.G. Kar victim’s mother from Panihati in West Bengal Assembly polls
content: A few days ago, Abhaya’s mother had confirmed that she will contest from Panihati Assembly seat on a BJP ticket. Several BJP leaders including Leader of Opposition Suvendu Adhikari had reached out to the family convincing the mother to contest the polls

title: No refund for last minute cancellation: Railways introduces new ticketing reforms for passengers
content: Union Minister for Railways Ashwini Vaishnaw said the changes are aimed at curbing misuse of the ticketing system and improving access for genuine passengers

title: Names of 13 lakh Bengal voters under adjudication deleted, say sources
content: The fate of half of the under-adjudication cases still hangs in the balance as voters wait for valid answers

title: 'India belongs to its people, not a select few': Rahul meets tribal leaders opposing Great Nicobar project
content: “As I listened to them, one thing became immediately clear: their frustration is not just about a ‘project’. This is about people, their identity, and their right to live with dignity on their own land,” Mr. Gandhi said.

title: T.N. election 2026: Encroachments, traffic congestion remain core issues in Anna Nagar
content: Unregulated parking is one of the major issues faced by Anna Nagar residents; they say industrial effluents are being discharged into Otteri Nullah waterway, leading to groundwater contamination and demand the shifting of all mobile eateries to non-residential areas in the constituency

title: India’s ‘newest voters’ caught in SIR adjudication trap in West Bengal
content: Thousands relocating from erstwhile enclaves got citizenship after 2015 Land Boundary Agreement, but have now been put “under adjudication” after SIR; angry voters claim this was done along communal lines

title: Ignoring Opposition’s notices, Rajya Sabha debates CAPF Bill
content: Bill aims to regulate recruitment, deputation, promotion, and other service conditions for paramilitary officers.

title: Papa Rao, 17 other Maoists surrender in Chhattisgarh
content: Papa Rao was also known by the aliases Ashok, Sunnam Chandrayya, and Mangu, and his association with the Maoist movement dated back to 1997.

title: Congress gets notices to vacate 24 Akbar Road office and Youth Congress premises on Raisina Road
content: Congress sources say the party is still formulating its strategy to counter the notices and keeping options open of moving court

title: China border patrols went up significantly post Galwan clash, data shows
content: From 173 patrols per month in 2017-18, the ITBP has ramped up the number of patrols to around 500 in 2023-24; the data was reported in the Union Home Ministry’s annual report for 2024-25 which was published on Wednesday

title: Parliament clears Transgender Bill amid an uproar
content: The Opposition demanded the Bill be sent to a select committee of the House for scrutiny; Union Minister says it will ensure protection to persons who face discrimination due to biological issues

title: Lone rangers flex their muscle against alliances in Assam battle
content: The “non-aligned” entities include All India United Democratic Front, United People’s Party Liberation, and All India Trinamool Congress

title: Singapore report ignites Zubeen death issue in Assam
content: While Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma said the Singapore court’s ruling makes the SIT case stronger, Congress leader Gaurav Gogoi terms it a gift for those accused of killing him

title: London High Court rejects Nirav Modi’s “reopen” petition against extradition
content: The matter was strongly argued by the Crown Prosecution Service advocate, ably assisted by a dedicated CBI team, including investigating officers who travelled to London for the hearing, says CBI

title: NCB focuses on identifying top 10 drug syndicates in J&K
content: More than 4,300 drone sightings and close to 970 cases of incursions have been reported in the past five years along India’s international borders

title: 'Friendly nations' only: Iran allows India, Pakistan, 3 other countries to use Strait of Hormuz
content: Iran has opened the Strait of Hormuz for friendly nations like India, China, Russia, Iraq, and Pakistan. This comes as UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres urged an end to the conflict and the reopening of the vital waterway. The Strait of Hormuz is a crucial oil route, and its volatility impacts global energy flows amid regional tensions.

title: 7th case against astrologer: Woman accuses Ashok Kharat of rape on promise of bright career
content: Astrologer Ashok Kharat faces a seventh rape case in Nashik after a 24-year-old woman accused him of drugging and sexually assaulting her multiple times. Kharat allegedly threatened the victim with his 'divine powers' to ensure her silence. This latest complaint follows his arrest on March 17, with a special investigation team now probing further allegations.

title: IPL opening ceremony in Bengaluru? BCCI takes big call before RCB vs SRH
content: In a poignant tribute to the 11 victims of last year's Bengaluru stampede, the BCCI has cancelled the IPL 2026 opening ceremony.  Instead, a grand closing ceremony is planned for the final on May 31. This decision marks a solemn remembrance of the tragedy that occurred during RCB's title celebrations, prioritizing respect over pre-match festivities.

title: Microsoft HR head makes it clear to employees it's time to change
content: Microsoft's Chief People Officer Amy Coleman announced a significant HR restructuring, prioritizing adaptability and speed for the AI era. This shakeup includes leadership changes and new teams focused on accelerating HR operations, employee experience, and workforce skilling. The move signals a shift towards agility and a faster pace for the tech giant.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ box office: Ranveer Singh's film inches close to Rs 1,000 crore
content: Despite a significant dip after its opening week, 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' has achieved a remarkable box office feat, nearing Rs 1000 crore globally within just seven days. The spy thriller, starring Ranveer Singh, experienced a massive opening weekend, breaking preview records before facing a decline in collections.

title: US-Iran mediation: JD Vance might visit Pakistan over weekend to talk it out with Tehran
content: US vice president JD Vance might visit Pakistan this week for crucial talks aimed at de-escalating the Middle East conflict with Iran. This potential visit, part of backchannel diplomacy, follows indications that Iran prefers negotiating through Vance. Pakistan has offered to host these sensitive discussions, even as the US maintains military pressure.

title: ‘Lacks basic understanding’: Pinarayi Vijayan slams Rahul Gandhi, calls Congress ‘B-team’ of BJP
content: Keralam Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan labelled Rahul Gandhi and the Congress as the BJP's 'B-team', questioning Gandhi's understanding of Keralam politics. This exchange follows Gandhi's accusation of a hidden understanding between the LDF and BJP, and his criticism of the state government's job promises. Both parties accuse each other of not being accountable to the people.

title: Billionaire founder Mark Cuban makes an AI prediction that employees may like
content: Mark Cuban predicts a future where AI adoption allows companies to shorten workdays by an hour, maintaining current pay. He urges businesses to embrace AI immediately, warning that those who don't will falter. Cuban emphasizes understanding AI's capabilities and risks, likening its memory to a savant but noting its lack of true understanding.

title: Will gold rally to Rs 1.55 lakh/10 grams & silver touch Rs 2.60 lakh/kg?
content: Gold and silver price prediction today: Gold and silver prices may sustain their up move in the coming sessions, says Abhilash Koikkara, Head - Forex & Commodities, Nuvama Professional Clients Group.

title: BCCI warns IPL captains on catch rules, provides update on impact player rule
content: IPL captains have been warned about strict enforcement of fielder movement rules during catches, with officials emphasizing complete control before celebrations. The Impact Player rule will also remain for at least another season, despite concerns from players like Axar Patel about its impact on all-rounder development.

title: 85+ year Harvard study reveals people with THIS kind of job are the unhappiest
content: A 85-year Harvard study reveals that emotionally isolating jobs lead to unhappiness, regardless of pay or hours.  Lack of genuine human connection leaves employees feeling empty and exhausted.  Positive workplace relationships are crucial for job satisfaction, better performance, and overall well-being, proving to be a vital component of a fulfilling work life.

title: Nvidia CEO warns 'You should know that you will lose your job to AI if your job is …'
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang foresees AI significantly impacting task-based jobs, urging individuals to embrace AI for automation. He advises graduates to become AI experts, emphasizing that jobs will evolve, not vanish, as technology advances.  Huang highlights that roles requiring human judgment, like radiology, demonstrate AI's potential to augment rather than replace professions, encouraging innovation.

title: 'He'd rather die in prison': Imran Khan unbowed, sons share powerful message
content: Imran Khan, imprisoned for nearly three years, remains resolute, his sons reveal.  Despite health concerns and his wife's alleged mistreatment, Khan states authorities will never break him. He finds strength in meditation, viewing his incarceration as a trial.  His sons, awaiting visas, last spoke to him for 28 minutes, noting his unwavering principles.

title: All about Brahmanandam’s Hyderabad white themed home
content: Comedy legend Brahmanandam's Hyderabad residence in Manikonda is a testament to his artistic soul. Featuring pristine white tile flooring and walls adorned with his own paintings and sculptures, the home blends modern and traditional aesthetics.  This lavish abode, often shared on social media, reflects the actor's creative spirit beyond his iconic film career.

title: Video: Bus falls off ferry into Padma River in Bangladesh; 23 dead
content: Tragedy struck Bangladesh as a passenger bus plunged into the Padma River, claiming at least 23 lives. Rescue efforts are ongoing to find missing individuals after the bus fell from a ferry near Daulatdia. Officials confirmed 23 bodies recovered, with some survivors reaching safety. The submerged bus was eventually lifted hours later.

title: Designer accused of domestic violence, arrested by authorities
content: In a shocking turn of events, rapper Desiigner, famed for his hit 'Panda', found himself in handcuffs in South Carolina on Monday, facing charges of third-degree domestic violence. Reports suggest a heated encounter involving both physical confrontation and property destruction, along with damage to the victim's clothing.

title: ‘Trump doesn’t bluff’: WH warns Iran, says ‘will unleash hell’ against 'any miscalculation'
content: The White House issued a stern warning to Iran, stating President Trump is prepared to "unleash hell" if Tehran rejects a deal to end the Middle East conflict. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt asserted that Iran has been militarily defeated and will face intensified strikes if it fails to accept this reality.

title: CBSE Class 10 result 2026: Expected date, past 5-year trends
content: CBSE Class 10 results for 2026 are anticipated soon, likely mid-May, mirroring past trends. Students can check scores on cbse.gov.in or results.cbse.nic.in, and via DigiLocker. Essential details like roll number and date of birth are needed. The board is expected to return to its usual mid-May release schedule after pandemic-induced delays in previous years.

title: Digital addiction in children: How concerned should parents be, and the early warning signs?
content: Digital addiction is a growing concern for parents as children spend excessive hours on devices, impacting physical and mental health. Experts urge parents to set screen time limits, encourage outdoor play, and engage in family activities. Recognizing warning signs like irritability and loss of interest in hobbies is crucial to foster healthy habits and improve children's well-being.

title: ‘Not one, but two Sheesh Mahals’: CAG report dominates Delhi assembly business
content: Delhi Assembly proceedings were dominated by the CAG report on former CM Arvind Kejriwal's official residence renovation, which cost Rs 33.6 crore, 342% above estimate. Chief Minister Rekha Gupta called it a "document of moral decline" and the House unanimously referred the matter to the Public Accounts Committee for further investigation.

title: 'Can’t tell him every single thing': Trump shown daily video of 'successful' strikes on Iran
content: The US military reported exceeding 10,000 strikes in its ongoing campaign, claiming it is ahead of schedule. However, a report suggests President Trump receives curated video updates highlighting only the most successful strikes, potentially omitting the full scope of the conflict. US Central Command stated the operation has significantly degraded Iran's naval and air defence capabilities

title: A tale of two cities: Bengaluru or Hyderabad who wins the battle of boomtowns?
content: A new report highlights the intensifying rivalry between Bengaluru and Hyderabad, India's economic powerhouses. While Bengaluru leads in startup funding and tech roles, Hyderabad is rapidly closing the gap in office space and company formation. Both cities are crucial economic drivers, with spending patterns and commute times showing distinct differences.

title: India buys first LPG cargo from Iran in years, tanker was initially bound for China
content: The LPG shipment will be distributed among three state-run fuel retailers: Indian Oil Corporation, Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited and Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited.

title: A’ja Wilson candidly recounts meeting with her fashion role model Beyoncé at Formula 1 race
content: A’ja Wilson reflected on meeting Beyoncé at a Formula 1 event, calling it a moment where “Nothing else matters.” The Las Vegas Aces star continues to grow her influence beyond basketball, blending fashion with elite performance. While embracing style and major platforms like the Met Gala, Wilson remains focused on her game, balancing off-court presence with her dominance and achievements on the court.

title: Candace Owens defends his Erika Kirk remarks; debate over free speech grows
content: Candace Owens supported Joe Rogan after his comments about Erika Kirk resurfaced online. She said Rogan speaks what people already think, which is why he stays popular. The issue started from an old video where Kirk discussed serious topics. Now, the debate has shifted to free speech, public opinion, and whether such comments go too far.

title: Philadelphia Eagles add $5M wide receiver to help Jalen Hurts elevate passing game
content: The Philadelphia Eagles have signed Elijah Moore to bolster their passing attack, aiming to provide Jalen Hurts with another reliable target. Moore's speed and ability to create separation are expected to ease pressure on top receivers and improve offensive rhythm. Despite a down year in 2025, his previous production and college connection with A.J.  if not, the pressure will remain on Jalen Hurts to elevate the offence. Either way, the Eagles have made it clear. They expect their passing game to improve in

title: 14 dead, 20 injured after private bus collides with lorry, bursts into flames in Andhra
content: A tragic accident occurred when a private travel bus collided with a tipper. The bus caught fire, resulting in the deaths of at least ten people. Around twenty-five passengers were on board. Twenty-one individuals sustained injuries and have been admitted to Markapur Hospital. Rescue efforts are ongoing as authorities investigate the cause of this devastating incident.

title: Virat Kohli sends IPL warning with 45 off 19 in RCB intra-squad game - Watch
content: Virat Kohli displayed explosive form with a 19-ball 45 in RCB's practice match, earning praise from mentor Dinesh Karthik. Kohli's consistent intent and drive to improve were highlighted. He was also seen bowling to struggling opener Phil Salt, showcasing team support. The IPL 2026 season opener is set for March 28.

title: 'They'll be killed': Trump says Iran 'afraid' to admit it wants a deal
content: President Trump asserted Iran desires a deal but fears its own people and the US. He highlighted decisive military actions against Iran's nuclear ambitions, claiming US systems intercepted 100 missiles. Trump criticized past administrations for inaction and vowed to eliminate Iran's nuclear threat, comparing it to 'cutting out cancer'.

title: 'Thought of jumping from car': Sivaramakrishnan on how racism scars led to depression
content: Sivaramakrishnan, who played 25 international matches for India in a five-year career, said the struggles became severe during the IPL held in the UAE during the Covid-19 lockdown. “I was down completely and I didn’t want to see myself in the mirror. I would have a couple of drinks and go to sleep because I could not bear anything. Whenever I was awake, I thought I was going to die.”

title: Iran claims it shot down 'F-18' over Chabahar; US fact-check tells a different story
content: US Central Command has debunked Iranian claims of shooting down an American F-18 fighter jet near Chabahar.  CENTCOM explicitly stated on X that no US fighter aircraft have been downed by Iran, refuting footage shared by Iranian state media. This denial comes as Iran rejected a US ceasefire proposal, insisting on its own terms for ending hostilities.

title: Oil beyond $100: Crude climbs amid US-Iran tensions, fresh Hormuz curbs fears linger
content: Oil prices rebounded past $100 as markets reassess Middle East conflict developments. Iran's mixed signals on US peace proposals, coupled with Trump's tougher stance, create market uncertainty. Meanwhile, the ongoing conflict severely impacts global supply chains, particularly through the Strait of Hormuz, leading to significant oil disruptions.

title: Harish Rana finds his 'happy place' in tearless funeral
content: In a poignant farewell that ended a 12-year vigil, 31-year-old Harish Rana was cremated at the Green Park crematorium in Delhi. With tears held back, his younger brother Ashish ignited the pyre, supported by their sister, who embodied strength.

title: Businessman on cycle killed as car ‘driven by 17-year-old’ hits him near Mumbai
content: A 42-year-old businessman was killed on Kalyan's incomplete Ring Road after being hit by a speeding car allegedly driven by a 17-year-old boy. The boy fled the scene but was apprehended later. The victim's brother highlighted the victim's new cycling habit for fitness, while locals expressed concern over speeding and stunts on the unfinished road.

title: 'If they take any step forward ... ': Iran claims enemies preparing to occupy its island
content: Iran warns of potential island seizure by "enemy countries" with regional support, vowing "relentless" strikes on vital infrastructure. This comes amid a significant US military buildup in the Middle East, with analysts suggesting the UAE might be involved and Kharg Island as a potential target.

title: Prithvi Shaw seeks redemption: ‘Humans make mistakes but that’s history’
content: Returning to the IPL after a year's absence, Prithvi Shaw appears more focused and mentally stronger, having learned from past excesses. The break from cricket, coupled with personal reflection, has allowed him to rebuild his confidence and dedication, as he now prioritises his passion for the game and harbours hopes of an India comeback.

title: Op Urja Suraksha: Navy deploys 5 warships to guide cargo vessels exiting troubled Strait of Hormuz
content: India's Navy has launched Operation Urja Suraksha.  More than five frontline warships are ensuring safe passage for India-bound cargo ships.  These vessels carry vital supplies like LPG and crude oil.  The operation escorts ships out of the troubled Strait of Hormuz.  This protects critical maritime routes and Indian crew.  Key successes have already been achieved.

title: 'Don't repeat Rohit mistake': Ex-cricketer urges MI to stick with Hardik amid Surya captaincy noise
content: Mumbai Indians have several experienced players in the dressing room, including Rohit Sharma and Suryakumar Yadav, both of whom have led India in T20 cricket. A couple of seasons ago, the franchise replaced Rohit with Hardik as captain, ending a tenure that brought five IPL titles. The decision drew reactions from sections of fans, especially with Hardik moving from Gujarat Titans and taking charge immediately.

title: Are banks open or closed today on Ram Navmi? Chek state-wise list
content: Bank customers must check holiday schedules before visiting branches this week. Closures will occur due to festivals and state holidays.  RBI guidelines also mean branches will be shut on the second and fourth Saturdays of March.  Plan your banking needs accordingly. Digital platforms like mobile apps and UPI remain active for everyday transactions.  Services requiring branch visits will be unavailable.

title: Murray drops 53, Jokic nearly has 20-20-20 game
content: Jamal Murray scored 53 points and Nikola Jokic had 23 points, 21 rebounds and 19 assists as the Nuggets held off the Mavericks on Wednesday night.

title: Brown-led Celts hand Thunder first loss in month
content: Jaylen Brown scored 14 of his 31 points in a pivotal third quarter, and the Boston Celtics rallied to beat the Oklahoma City Thunder 119-109 on Wednesday night, snapping the defending champions' 12-game win streak.

title: Nacua sued over alleged antisemitic remark, bite
content: A woman in Los Angeles has filed a civil lawsuit against Puka Nacua alleging the Rams wide receiver made an "unprovoked antisemitic statement" and later bit her on the shoulder.

title: Fried's gem lifts Yanks despite Judge's 4-K opener
content: Max Fried allowed just two hits in 6⅓ scoreless innings, and the Yankees cruised past the Giants 7-0 on Wednesday night despite Aaron Judge's first career hitless Opening Day.

title: Arizona's Lloyd brushes off UNC job speculation
content: Amid speculation he could be a candidate for the vacancy at North Carolina, Arizona coach Tommy Lloyd insisted all his attention is with his program ahead of Thursday's Sweet 16 game against Arkansas.

title: Macdonald: JSN deal rewards 'foundational' player
content: Seahawks GM John Schneider and coach Mike Macdonald said they felt comfortable giving Jaxon Smith-Njigba his record-setting extension because of his "unique combination" of excellence on and off the field.

title: Flacco: Teams 'dumb' for not signing me to start
content: Joe Flacco is back with the Bengals as Joe Burrow's backup, but he isn't shy about voicing his belief that teams made a mistake by passing on him to be their starting quarterback.

title: Seahawks to open on Wed. due to Australia game
content: The Super Bowl LX champion Seahawks will open the season on the Wednesday of Week 1 instead of hosting the usual Thursday night opener.

title: ⚾ Fantasy baseball draft guide: Rankings, more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Takeaways from Yankees' rout of Giants and what to know for every Opening Day game
content: Here's your one-stop shop for all of the season-opening action, which began with a shellacking in San Francisco.

title: Predicting the 2026 MLB season, from the playoffs and World Series to MVP and Cy Young
content: Can the Dodgers three-peat? Will Skubal and Skenes win another Cy Young? Our experts make their predictions for the 2026 baseball season.

title: March Madness 2026: Bilas' path to the men's Final Four for every Sweet 16 team
content: This tournament has given us basketball at its best. Here's what to expect from a Sweet 16 that will be just as electric.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting the Sabres' first-round opponent
content: Wednesday's matchup against Boston could be repeated in April. Plus, updated playoff projections after Tuesday's massive slate.

title: How the new WNBA CBA will impact every player's salary in 2026
content: A'ja Wilson will likely get the $1.4 million supermax, while Caitlin Clark's rookie contract will pay over $500,000.

title: Ranking all 32 NFL free agency classes: Which teams most improved their rosters?
content: How did all 32 NFL teams fare in March, taking into account free agent signings, trades, extensions and departures? We stacked each class.

title: Predicting Rounds 1-2 of the NFL draft: Yates finds landing spots for 64 top prospects
content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?
